popularStory.headline: Breve história

zh.Nelas, Nelas, Viseu, Portugal: 葡萄牙維尼拉斯尼拉斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Don Payo Gutierrez da Silva於1070年出生在葡萄牙維尼拉斯尼拉斯時，他的父親Señor Guterre Pelaez Señor De Alderete De Yusan Y De Susan5歲，母親D. Maria Ovenal120歲。他和D. Sancha Annes de Mentor至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1129年在他的家鄉享年59歲。

zh-hans.Nelas, Nelas, Viseu, Portugal: 葡萄牙維尼拉斯尼拉斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Don Payo Gutierrez da Silva于1070年出生在葡萄牙維尼拉斯尼拉斯时，他的父亲Señor Guterre Pelaez Señor De Alderete De Yusan Y De Susan5岁，母亲D. Maria Ovenal120岁。他和D. Sancha Annes de Mentor至少有4个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1129年在他的家乡享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gutierrez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Jesus, Manuel, Carlos, Francisco, Jorge, Pedro, Raul, Miguel, Roberto.

Spanish (Gutiérrez): patronymic from the medieval personal name Gutierre, from a Visigothic personal name of uncertain form and meaning, perhaps a compound of the elements gunthi ‘battle’ + hairus ‘sword’.

variants.name: Gutierez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jesus, Jose, Ignacio, Manuel, Adalberto, Ana Maria, Angel, Carlota, Emilio, Exiquio, Felipe, Fermin.
Hispanic (Gutiérez): altered form of Spanish Gutiérrez (see Gutierrez ).

variants.name: Gutirrez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Gutiérrez (see Gutierrez ).

variants.name: Guterrez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Gutiérrez (see Gutierrez ).

variants.name: Guiterrez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Arturo, Francisco, Alfredo, Jesus, Rafael, Raul, Carlos, Guadalupe, Jose Luis.
Hispanic (Guitérrez): altered form of Spanish Gutiérrez (see Gutierrez ).

variants.name: Gutierres
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Ramon, Jesus, Juan, Manuel, Alberto, Alfonzo, Alvaro, Ana, Andres, Antelmo, Catalina.
Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Gutiérrez (see Gutierrez ).

variants.name: Guitierez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Gutiérrez (see Gutierrez ).

variants.name: Guttierrez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jesus, Jose, Pablo, Raul, Reina, Adolfo, Beatriz, Carlos, Diego, Evangelina, Felicita, Humberto.
Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Gutiérrez (see Gutierrez ).

variants.name: Guitierrez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Enrique, Jaime, Manuel, Miguel, Ofelia, Ricardo, Salvador, Andres, Argentina, Armando.
Hispanic (Guitiérrez): altered form of Spanish Gutiérrez (see Gutierrez ).

nameMeanings.name: da
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 達, said to be derived from the personal name Shu Da (叔達), a talent during the reign of the legendary king Zhuanxu (traditional dates: 2514–2437  BC ); or adopted as a Han surname by other minority ethnic groups.
Mandarin form of the surname 笪, a surname originating in ancient Jianzhou (located in present-day Fujian province) and Jurong (located in Jiangsu province) or a surname from the Hui ethnic group.

nameMeanings.name: Silva
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Carlos, Juan, Luis, Jesus, Mario, Fernando, Francisco, Pedro, Roberto, Miguel.  Portuguese Joao, Paulo, Joaquim, Agostinho, Duarte, Henrique, Serafim, Vasco, Ilidio, Adao, Afonso, Altair.

Portuguese, Galician, and Italian: habitational name from any of the many places called Silva in Portugal, Galicia (Spain), and Italy, or a topographic name from (Old) Portuguese and (Old) Galician silva ‘wood’, later ‘bramble’. Compare Da Silva and Silba .

Jewish (Sephardic): adoption of the Iberian surname (see 1 above) at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the name their families used as Catholics.

variants.name: Da Silva
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Carlos, Luis, Fernando, Francisco, Luiz, Mario, Jorge, Julio, Marcelo, Roberto.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Paulo, Duarte, Agostinho, Henrique, Marcio, Nelio, Albano, Altair, Amadeu, Catarina.
Portuguese and Galician: variant of Silva , with the addition of da, a shortened form of the preposition de ‘from’ and the feminine definite article a ‘the’.

variants.name: Silba
meanings: Hispanic and Italian (Apulia): altered form of Portuguese, Galician, and Italian   Silva  .

variants.name: Silveira
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Luis, Fernando, Carlos, Pedro, Francisco, Mario, Ana, Joaquin, Jorge, Adolfo.  Portuguese Joao, Paulo, Altair, Duarte, Henrique, Joaquim, Serafim.

Portuguese and Galician: topographic name from silveira ‘woodland’, a collective derivative of silva (see Silva ); or a habitational name from any of the places called Silveira in Lugo and Pontevedra provinces, Galicia (Spain). Compare Da Silveira , Selvera , and Silvera .

variants.name: Sylva
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Fernande, Mathieu.
Altered form of Portuguese, Galician, and Italian   Silva  . Outside the US this surname is most common in Senegal and the Gambia, where it is of Portuguese origin.

variants.name: Silvas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Ruben, Carlos, Juan, Manuel, Raul, Jose, Lupe, Roberto, Alfredo, Armando, Domingo, Emilio.
Portuguese and Galician: topographic name from silvas, plural of silva ‘thicket, bramble’. See Silva .
Americanized form of Hungarian Szilvás: occupational name for a grower or seller of soft fruits, derived from szilva ‘plum’.

nameMeanings.name: Payo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin personal name Caius; borne by numerous saints of the early Christian period.

historicEvents.description: Afonso inherits the County of Portugal, a province of Castile.

en.lifeSummary: When Don Payo Gutierrez da Silva was born in 1070, in Nelas, Nelas, Viseu, Portugal, his father, Señor Guterre Pelaez Señor De Alderete De Yusan Y De Susan, was 5 and his mother, D. Maria Ovenal, was 120. He had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with D. Sancha Annes de Mentor. He died in 1129, in his hometown, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Don Payo Gutierrez da Silva est né en 1070, à Nelas, Nelas, Viseu, Portugal, son père, Señor Guterre Pelaez Señor De Alderete De Yusan Y De Susan, avait 5 ans et sa mère, D. Maria Ovenal, avait 120 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec D. Sancha Annes de Mentor. Il est décédé en 1129, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Don Payo Gutierrez da Silva 1070 in Nelas, Nelas, Viseu, Portugal geboren wurde, war sein Vater Señor Guterre Pelaez Señor De Alderete De Yusan Y De Susan 5 und seine Mutter D. Maria Ovenal 120. Er hatte mit D. Sancha Annes de Mentor mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1129 im Alter von 59 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Don Payo Gutierrez da Silva è nato il nel 1070 nel Nelas, Nelas, Viseu, Portogallo, il suo padre, Señor Guterre Pelaez Señor De Alderete De Yusan Y De Susan, aveva 5 anni e il suo madre, D. Maria Ovenal, aveva 120 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con D. Sancha Annes de Mentor. Morì nel 1129, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.Nelas, Nelas, Viseu, Portugal: ポルトガルヴィセウネラスネラス
ja.lifeSummary: Don Payo Gutierrez da Silvaが1070年にポルトガルヴィセウネラスネラスで生まれた時，父Señor Guterre Pelaez Señor De Alderete De Yusan Y De Susanは5歳，母D. Maria Ovenalは120歳であった。彼はD. Sancha Annes de Mentorとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1129年に故郷で59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Don Payo Gutierrez da Silva(이)가 1070년 포르투갈 비세우 넬아스 넬아스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Señor Guterre Pelaez Señor De Alderete De Yusan Y De Susan(은)는 5세였고, 그의 어머니 D. Maria Ovenal(은)는 120세였다. 그는 D. Sancha Annes de Mentor(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1129년 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Don Payo Gutierrez da Silva nasceu em 1070, em Nelas, Nelas, Viseu, Portugal, seu pai, Señor Guterre Pelaez Señor De Alderete De Yusan Y De Susan, tinha 5 anos e sua mãe, D. Maria Ovenal, tinha 120 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha com D. Sancha Annes de Mentor. Ele faleceu em 1129, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Don Payo Gutierrez da Silva родился в 1070 г. в местности нелас, нелас, висеу, Португалия, его отцу по имени Señor Guterre Pelaez Señor De Alderete De Yusan Y De Susan было 5 лет, а матери, которую звали D. Maria Ovenal, 120. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от D. Sancha Annes de Mentor. Он умер в 1129 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Don Payo Gutierrez da Silva nació en 1070, en Nelas, Nelas, Viseu, Portugal, su papá, Señor Guterre Pelaez Señor De Alderete De Yusan Y De Susan, tenía 5 años y su mamá, D. Maria Ovenal, tenía 120 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija con D. Sancha Annes de Mentor. Murió en 1129, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años.
